title: You need a work permit - Canada.ca
content:
## You need a work permit (an Innovation Stream worker needs a work permit)
Based on your answers, you may be eligible for an employer-specific work permit . To be eligible for this work permit, you must have received a job offer from one of the employers participating in The Global Hypergrowth Project (GHP) .
You must also meet the general eligibility requirements for a work permit.
Find out more about LMIA-exempt work permits for workers in the Innovation Stream .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
